return(function(V,b,f,B,e,S,q,x,h,s,v,m,D,Q,G,o,E,l,i,d,r,M,F,g)F,h,m,Q,M,D,v,d,l,g,x,s,i,G,E,r,o={},function(V,X)local b=M(X)local f=function(...)return Q(V,{...},X,b)end return f end,function(V,X)local b=M(X)local f=function(f,B,e)return Q(V,{f;B,e},X,b)end return f end,function(Q,f,B,e)local a,Sr,W1,I1,T,u1,P,c,S1,e1,Z,E1,O1,n1,G1,y1,B1,z1,g1,Gr,h1,C,A1,n,Vr,z,F1,i,X1,V1,o1,K1,f1,Fr,c1,J,d1,k,t1,T1,p,m1,H1,v1,R1,Y1,p1,Z1,t,k1,I,q,M,ir,C1,N1,v,L,x1,q1,fr,s1,Br,dr,w,P1,A,R,H,er,W,N,O,D1,U1,a1,Xr,l1,M1,qr,b1,u,Q1,L1,F,Qr,Y,y,br,j,U,K,w1,r1,j1,J1,i1,h
